scene: Party elders circulate an oath to keep Greek bloodlines unmixed. Signatures are being watched.

choices.label: Sign prominently
choices.resultText: Your name sits high on the scroll.

choices.label: Find reasons to delay
choices.resultText: The elders note the empty space where your name should be.

scene: House Timon seeks patrons for a school teaching only Greek letters, Homer, and the old ways.

choices.label: Fund it generously
choices.resultText: Children will recite Homer because of you.

choices.label: Give a token sum
choices.resultText: Noted. Barely.

scene: A prominent citizen has wed a Gaulish chieftain's daughter. The party wants it condemned in the assembly.

choices.label: Deliver the condemnation yourself
choices.resultText: Your speech is quoted for a month. So is his glare.

choices.label: Refuse - a marriage is a marriage
choices.resultText: Principled. Costly.

scene: The party organizes a torchlit procession to the Temple of Apollo, old families first.

choices.label: March in your House's place
choices.resultText: Torchlight on old stone. This is what the city was.

choices.label: Pay for a place near the front
choices.resultText: Visibility has a price. You paid it.

scene: Party leadership calls for a boycott of Gaulish goods in the agora.

choices.label: Empty your household of Gaulish wares
choices.resultText: A purer household, a thinner purse.

choices.label: Keep buying, quietly
choices.resultText: Gaulish hides are cheaper than ever now. Discretion advised.

scene: Your House's ancestral rites fall due. The party expects the old forms, performed exactly.

choices.label: Perform every syllable as written
choices.resultText: The ancestors, presumably, approve.

choices.label: Shorten the tedious parts
choices.resultText: Done by noon. Someone counted the verses.

scene: A party member drifts toward reformist talk. Leadership asks you to bring him back.

choices.label: Reason with him over wine
choices.resultText: By the third cup he remembers his grandfather's politics.

choices.label: Hint at consequences
choices.resultText: He returns to the fold, watching you sideways.

scene: House Timon stages a classical tragedy and offers you a sponsorship credit.

choices.label: Sponsor the chorus
choices.resultText: Your name is announced before the first line.

choices.label: Just attend
choices.resultText: Aeschylus still lands, three centuries on.

scene: The party commissions a genealogy audit tracing members to the Phocaean founders. Yours has a gap.

choices.label: Pay scribes to close the gap honestly
choices.resultText: A great-grandmother from Phocaea, documented. Mostly.

choices.label: Have the gap... filled
choices.resultText: The parchment looks suitably ancient. Sleep lightly.

scene: A priest of Apollo plans a sermon against Gaulish grove-rites creeping into the city. He wants a notable citizen beside him.

choices.label: Stand beside him
choices.resultText: The steps of the temple, the crowd below, your face beside the fire of his words.

choices.label: Decline - too divisive
choices.resultText: He finds someone else. The someone else is now more famous.
